title: cystopteris regia
intro: Cystopteris regia, also known as the Royal Fern, is a perennial plant species within the fern family, native to North America. The Royal Fern has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant's health benefits include its antiseptic and antibacterial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds, while also providing relief from coughs and colds. The herbal preparations of Cystopteris regia include teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments, including bronchitis and other respiratory conditions.
